definition: A public HedgAI holder flex wall. It ranks token ownership and public wallet posture, not audited profit.

featured_wallets.control: Owner-only controls remain off public packets

qualification_filter: Trinity Qualified wallets carry HedgAI with SOL fuel and stablecoin reserve support.
safety_note: Holding HedgAI does not prove trading skill, net worth, exchange profit, or future returns.
title: Proof of Profit Wall
